bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=derivatives-strategist Items: 2 · Forecasts emitted: 10 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-23 · [research_task] 分析Skew与Equity Put-Call的背离成因

DONE · owner=derivatives-strategist · research discussion=分析Skew与Equity Put-Call的背离成因 (led by derivatives-strategist)

根据'协同请求'中的'Skew/Put-Call 断层分析'，研究目前的 Skew (1s38) 与 Equity Put-Call (0.51) 的背离原因，判断是机构在用指数看跌期权对冲，还是散户在裸卖看涨期权。

  • Outcome: research discussion "分析Skew与Equity Put-Call的背离成因" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-05-23，最终QA评级为FAIL/发布阻断。可保留的证据包括Cboe期权背离、10Y TIPS实际收益率、PJM容量重定价、EIA石油发电占比极低、LBNL并网队列、DOE变压器交期与WoodMac电气设备瓶颈。但实时工作区缺失research note、research note、session-brief.md和analyst-catalog.json；prior research notes/05/09存在占位或不可审计来源；prior research notes的并网队列与FERC日期需修正；prior research notesVaR结果应标注为代理情景而非组合事实。 | → 10 forecast(s) on SKEW,SP…

  • Forecasts: 10 (0 positions); tickers: SKEW, SPXW, VVIX, IEA, CCGT, MW

2026-05-22 · [research_task] Gamma Wall 压力测试

DONE · owner=derivatives-strategist · research discussion=Gamma Wall 压力测试 (led by derivatives-strategist)

分析 S&P 500 在 5350 点位附近的 Call Wall 压力，并评估如果明日开盘走弱，0DTE 期权是否会引发 Gamma 挤压式的回撤。

  • Outcome: research discussion "Gamma Wall 压力测试" → failed | cards=5 | error: error code: 502
